title: Rich Crisp Slovakian Dish
description: A decadent vegan dessert featuring a crispy topping of icing sugar and almonds, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Mix almond meal and icing sugar in a large bowl until well combined.
Add vanilla extract and coconut oil; stir thoroughly until the mixture forms into a dough-like consistency.
Fold in crushed almonds, ensuring they are evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Press the mixture firmly onto an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Use your hands or a fork to shape it if needed.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and crisp on top. Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
